subject: [PATCH v5 10/21] swap: move swap cache to virtual swap descriptor

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch moves the swap cache and workingset shadow for anonymous pages to the virtual swap descriptor, effectively range-partitioning the swap cache by virtual swap clusters of PMD size. This change eliminates lock contention in the swap cache, improving performance. The patch updates several kernel files, including huge_memory.c, migrate.c, shmem.c, and vmscan.c, to use the new virtual swap descriptor instead of the global swap cache lock. The approach taken is to introduce a per-folio swap pointer that allows for more efficient locking and reduces contention in the swap cache.
